title: KU hydrologist receives Fulbright Scholar Award to research High Plains aquifer
summary_en: Sam Zipper, an ecohydrologist at the Kansas Geological Survey and assistant professor at the University of Kansas, has received a Fulbright U.S. Scholar Program award from the U.S. Department of State and the Fulbright Foreign Scholarship Board.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学水文学家获富布赖特学者奖 将就高平原含水层开展研究

title: KLETC hosts inaugural 5K, 1-mile event supporting fentanyl awareness
summary_en: In partnership with the Wichita Metro Crime Commission, KLETC hosted its first Law Enforcement Against Fentanyl 5K race and 1-mile walk. The event took place on the center’s Emergency Vehicle Operator Course, offering participants a rare opportunity to run on the training track.
title_cn: 堪萨斯州执法培训中心举办首届5公里跑及1英里走活动 开展芬太尼防范意识宣传

title: NSF digitization project opens access to millions of African plant specimens
summary_en: A National Science Foundation grant led by Town Peterson, University Distinguished Professor of Ecology & Evolutionary Biology and senior curator with the KU Natural History Museum and Biodiversity Institute, is uniting 21 U.S. herbaria, biodiversity data specialists and African researchers to create one of the largest digital resources of tropical African seed plants ever assembled.
title_cn: 美国国家科学基金会资助数字化项目实现数百万份非洲植物标本资源开放获取

title: Bart Swartz named growth officer for KU Achievement & Assessment Institute
summary_en: The Achievement & Assessment Institute (AAI) at the University of Kansas has named Bart Swartz its first growth officer, a new executive role created to strengthen AAI’s position as a national leader in research-based solutions for education and community well-being.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学成就与评估研究所任命巴特·斯沃茨为首任发展官

title: Advisory: Media invited to ceremonial groundbreaking for KU Entrepreneurship Hub on April 24
summary_en: KU leaders, alumni, donors and community partners will gather April 24 to celebrate the ceremonial groundbreaking of KU’s Entrepreneurship Hub, a new, donor-funded facility operated by the School of Business and designed to serve students of all disciplines.
title_cn: Advisory: Media invited to ceremonial groundbreaking for KU Entrepreneurship Hub on April 24

title: Kit and Diana Smith pledge $3 million to support KU Law students and student-athletes
summary_en: Christopher “Kit” and Diana Smith have tapped into their passions for the law and student athletes and pledged $3 million to the University of Kansas — $2 million to create the Dean Davis Law School Scholars Fund and $1 million to create the Kit and Diana Smith Athletics Scholarship.
title_cn: 基特·史密斯与戴安娜·史密斯承诺捐赠300万美元支持堪萨斯大学法学院学生及学生运动员

title: New philosophical theory of personal well-being introduced in latest ‘Oxford Handbook’
summary_en: In a new book chapter, Jason Raibley, associate professor of philosophy at the University of Kansas, proposes a new theory of personal well-being in which the most essential building block is having and then realizing personal values through one’s own agency.
title_cn: 《牛津规范伦理学手册》最新版本引入个人福祉全新哲学理论

title: KU research lab provides KC high school students with unique learning experience
summary_en: The Unckless Lab at the University of Kansas conducted a yearlong outreach program with Blue Valley North High School, helping students learn about microbial diversity in insects. The work was funded by a grant from the National Science Foundation.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学研究实验室为堪萨斯城高中生提供特色科研学习体验

title: Students will share work at 29th Annual Undergraduate Research Symposium
summary_en: The Center for Undergraduate Research & Fellowships will host over 150 students, both online and in person, presenting their research and creative works to faculty, staff, peers and the public during Undergraduate Research Week.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学第29届年度本科生科研研讨会即将举办 学生将展示研究创作成果

title: Renowned earthwork artist Stan Herd creating Algerian flag installation in Lawrence for World Cup
summary_en: On a slope of grassland near Iowa Street and Bob Billings Parkway, behind the Lied Center of Kansas, Lawrence-based earthwork artist Stan Herd is creating an image of an Algerian flag, rippling in the wind.
title_cn: 著名地景艺术家斯坦·赫德为2026年男子足球世界杯在劳伦斯市创作阿尔及利亚国旗地景装置
